pages.raw_text:
The hearing the petition to take
the Idaho Smelling & Refining Co.
out of bankruptcy will occur tomor-
row before Judge Whitson, and in
dications are that this petition will
be granted, as there seems to be no
opposition. Affairs are shaping
themselves SO that the plant should
be placed in operation about the
first of the year. The intrinsic
value of the company's holdings
were never more than at present,
and 1t is understood that the rail-
roads serving that territory where
the smelter is located consider it to
be a stragetic point for a reduction
plant. That financial assistance is
coming from transportation COM
panies seems reasonable, and it
looks as though the stock was
shaping for q good upward move
ment.
